zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. von Waldeck於1262年出生在瓦爾德可瓦爾德可時，他的父親Heinrich III. von Waldeck26歲，母親Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg23歲。他於1276年11月24日與Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年11月11日在德國薩辛海利根斯塔特海利根斯塔特享年43歲，埋葬在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可內載。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I. von Waldeck于1262年出生在瓦爾德可瓦爾德可时，他的父亲Heinrich III. von Waldeck26岁，母亲Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg23岁。他于1276年11月24日与Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年11月11日在德国薩辛海利根斯塔特海利根斯塔特享年43岁，埋葬在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可內載。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Waldeck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from a place in Hesse, on the Eder river, probably named from Old High German wald ‘wood, forest’ + ecka, egga ‘corner’, ‘nook’.

variants.name: Waldock
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from a place called Waldeck in South Holland or one in Germany, near Koblenz.

English (Hertfordshire): apparently a variant of the Yorkshire surname Weldrick, a habitational name from Wheldrake in East Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English cweld ‘death, place where a death took place’ + ric ‘narrow strip of land, narrow road’.

variants.name: Waldecker
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Waldeck  .

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. von Waldeck was born in 1262, in Waldeck, Waldeck, his father, Heinrich III. von Waldeck, was 26 and his mother, Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, was 23. He married Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant on 24 November 1276, in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 November 1305, in Heiligenstadt, Heiligenstadt, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 43, and was buried in Netze, Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. von Waldeck est né en 1262, à Waldeck, Waldeck, son père, Heinrich III. von Waldeck, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant le 24 novembre 1276, à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1305, à Heiligenstadt, Heiligenstadt, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Netze, Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I. von Waldeck 1262 in Waldeck, Waldeck geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich III. von Waldeck 26 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg 23. Er hat am 24. November 1276 in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1305 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Heiligenstadt, Heiligenstadt, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Netze, Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont begraben.

Lui sposato Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant il 24 novembre 1276, nel Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Ele casou-se com Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant em 24 de novembro de 1276, em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. von Waldeck родился в 1262 г. в местности валдекк, валдекк, его отцу по имени Heinrich III. von Waldeck было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Cuyk-Arnsberg, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant 24 ноября 1276 г. в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 ноября 1305 г. в местности хилидженстадт, хилидженстадт, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности нец, валдекк, эдир, валдекк-пирмонт.

Se casó con Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant el 24 de noviembre de 1276, en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas.
